/usr/bin/cc -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/engine.c.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/input_map.c.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/joystick.c.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/log.c.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/lua_bindings.c.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/renderer.c.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/sdl_gyro.c.o -o bin/engine  _deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a libglad_gl.a liblua_static.a _deps/spng-build/libspng_static.a _deps/sdl2-build/libSDL2d.a -framework OpenGL -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libz.tbd -lm -Wl,-framework,CoreVideo -Wl,-framework,Cocoa -Wl,-framework,IOKit -Wl,-framework,ForceFeedback -Wl,-framework,Carbon -Wl,-framework,CoreAudio -Wl,-framework,AudioToolbox -Wl,-framework,AVFoundation -Wl,-framework,Foundation -Wl,-weak_framework,GameController -Wl,-weak_framework,Metal -Wl,-weak_framework,QuartzCore -Wl,-weak_framework,CoreHaptics
